pick_garment_from_stack.query: the worker grasps and lifts the top folded garment from a stack

insert_garment_into_bag.query: the worker slides a folded garment through the opening of a transparent packaging bag

seal_bag_flap.query: the worker folds over the adhesive flap of the transparent packaging bag and presses it down with the fingers to seal it

place_package_to_right.query: the worker lifts the sealed garment package, moves it to the right side of the worktable, and sets it down
